source.name: StockCharts S&P 500 % Above 50-Day SMA ($SPXA50R)
source.note: Manual extract: last trading-day EOD close from StockCharts $SPXA50R SharpChart (2026-05-22 close 58.0). Cross-checked against Barchart S&P 500 Stocks Above 50-Day Average ($S5FI) reading 56.77 on the same session — directionally consistent (both above 50%) but vendors differ by 1.2 pp, so left manual_unverified. Not a live feed.
